A perfect Saturday in June. What should we do? Plumbing!

Monument Valley 2 is as lovely as the original.

Great session! Well done, @optshiftk! I can’t wait to use all this stuff in iOS 11.

05 Jun 2017

Sweep!

04 Jun 2017

With Clyde as my daily driver now, I spent the afternoon tuning up my 20 year old Marin, now named Bonnie, and taking off the commuter accessories. She rides nice but it feels like slo-mo after the electric.

04 Jun 2017

And then you have long and productive twitter conversation with the past (and future?) mayor of Seattle. Thanks, @mayormcginn.

04 Jun 2017

Hmm. A four hour long, TBA session on WWDC Monday. Developer hands-on room with new hardware?

04 Jun 2017

Cracked open an old side project that was my first in Swift. Shudder. So bad.

04 Jun 2017

Happy WWeve! I’m jealous of the folks headed to San Jose, but excited about the new toys we’ll all learn about starting tomorrow.

04 Jun 2017

“Altruism, trust, cooperation and virtue are unaffordable luxuries in the struggle of all against all. Everything is about self-interest.” —David Brooks

With 20% of GDP, this would make a nice core for secession. “New York, California and Washington … are committed to achieving the U.S. goal of reducing emissions 26-28 percent from 2005 levels ” —WA.gov
